title: Senior Teacher - WhiteHat Jr - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - WhiteHat Jr - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? WhiteHat Jr in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About WhiteHat Jr:
WhiteHat Jr is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WhiteHat Jr!
